description: New construction of a +30,000 square foot (12 Key) boutique hotel / townhouses at 1031 Annunciation Street. The project consist of a new 3 story main building located at the corner of Annunciation and Poeyfarre St and a two story support building located mid property. Parking will be provided on site in rear on the same lot.
Proposed modifications to the corner building entry, additional windows at the Lafayette St Side, and the 3rd floor roof enclosure at the rear of the property.

description: THE WHITNEY BANK PROJECT INCLUDES MULTIPLE HISTORICAL BUILDINGS ON A SINGLE SITE AND CONSTRUCTED IN 1909 WITH AN APPROXIMATE AGGREGATE AREA OF 439,732 SQ.FT. THE CURRENT OCCUPANCY OF THE BUILDINGS IS BUSINESS AND MOSTLY CONTAIN OFFICESPACE. THE INTENT OF THE PROJECT IS TO RENOVATE BUILDINGS A, C & D FOR RESIDENTIAL USE. OCCUPANCY IS BEING CHANGED FROM GROUP B OCCUPANCY TO GROUP R-2 OCCUPANCY. BUILDING 'A' IS A14-STORY BUILDING WITH BASEMENT AND MEZZANINE, BUILDING 'C' IS A 1-STORY BUILDING WITH MEZZANINE AND BUILDING 'D' IS A 4-STORY BUILDING WITH MEZZANINE. AREAS WITHIN THESE BUILDINGS ARE TO BE MODIFIED ARE AS FOLLOWS; SEE SHEET G1.001 FOR DIAGRAM OF BUILDING LCOATIONS AND HEIGHTS.
